states.name: California
states.notes: Seeded with federal + California AB 45 / Prop 65 style rules. Expand for other states before relying on them.

states.name: Template for other states
states.notes: Placeholder profile. Add state-specific rules and official sources before use.

rules.title: Risky disease / treatment claim language
rules.fail_summary: The page contains claim language that may cause FDA to view the product as an unapproved drug or misbranded product.
rules.pass_summary: No obvious high-risk disease/treatment terms were detected.
rules.recommendation: Remove or soften disease/treatment claims, and ensure the page does not imply diagnosis, cure, mitigation, treatment, or prevention of disease.

sources.title: FDA: cannabis/CBD warning on treatment claims
FDA warning letter example for CBD lotion / pain-relief claims

rules.title: Missing lab-results / COA link
rules.fail_summary: No obvious lab-result / COA link was detected on the page.
rules.pass_summary: A possible lab-result / COA link was detected.
rules.recommendation: Add a clear, batch-aware COA or lab-results link on the product page, and verify the page explains how the customer can match the report to the product.

sources.title: California public notice: manufacturers must include a certificate of analysis

rules.title: Missing California hemp FDA disclaimer

patterns: this product has not been evaluated by the fda
these statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration

rules.fail_summary: The page does not appear to include a visible FDA disclaimer.
rules.pass_summary: A likely FDA disclaimer was detected.
rules.recommendation: Add a conspicuous FDA disclaimer on the product page and verify the same disclaimer appears where required in labels and downstream sales surfaces.

rules.title: California inhalable hemp sale risk
rules.fail_summary: The page text suggests an inhalable hemp product, which raises a major California-specific risk.
rules.pass_summary: No obvious inhalable hemp terms were detected.
rules.recommendation: Review California rules carefully before offering inhalable hemp products for sale into California. Route any California traffic away from prohibited SKUs if needed.

sources.title: CDPH FAQ: industrial hemp inhalables may not be sold in California
CDPH public notice on inhalable industrial hemp

rules.title: Possible missing California Prop 65 THC warning

patterns: known to the state of california to cause birth defects or other reproductive harm
warning: consuming this product will expose you to thc

rules.fail_summary: No obvious Prop 65 THC warning language was detected on the page.
rules.pass_summary: A likely Prop 65 THC warning was detected.
rules.recommendation: Review whether this product triggers a Prop 65 THC warning and, if so, place the warning conspicuously on the page and packaging using counsel-approved language.

sources.title: California Proposition 65: Cannabis and THC products

rules.title: Missing THC percentage / content disclosure
rules.fail_summary: No obvious THC-content disclosure or spectrum disclosure was detected.
rules.pass_summary: A likely THC-content or spectrum disclosure was detected.
rules.recommendation: Add plain-language disclosure about THC content or spectrum and ensure product details match the linked lab report and label claims.

sources.title: CDPH public notice: total THC constraints under AB 45
